DESCRIPTION: Date cutover or late-arriving feed causes temporary variance
EXAMPLE: Trade on T not in downstream on T (appears on T+1)

DESCRIPTION: Small variance due to rounding/precision differences
EXAMPLE: FX conversion differs at 6 vs 8 decimals

DESCRIPTION: Missing or invalid reference or attribute causes mismatch or rejects
EXAMPLE: Missing FX rate for currency pair/date

DESCRIPTION: Different business rules or derivations between systems
EXAMPLE: Transaction type mapped differently leading to sign flip
